title: 02121_Calibrating_Multimodal_Learning
positive_examples: Improves the reliability of multimodal learning methods, which can enhance applications in high-stakes scenarios like medical analysis and autonomous driving.
CML regularization can improve classification accuracy and model robustness, making systems more trustworthy in critical applications.
negative_examples: Models may become overconfident based on partial modalities, leading to poor decision-making in critical applications like medical diagnosis.
The reliance on certain modalities can result in a lack of robustness when some modalities are corrupted, which can be detrimental in real-world applications.
